zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg於1314年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫時，她的父親Otto IV. von Ravensberg38歲，母親Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck30歲。她於1335年與Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg在德國海因里希_結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1389年2月13日享年75歲，埋葬在爾利。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Margarete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg was born in 1314, in Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, her father, Otto IV. von Ravensberg, was 38 and her mother, Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck, was 30. She married Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg in 1335, in Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 February 1389, at the age of 75, and was buried in Jülich.

fr.Ravensberg, Westfalen, Germany: Ravensberg, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg est née en 1314, à Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Otto IV. von Ravensberg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg en 1335, à Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1389, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Jülich.

de.Ravensberg, Westfalen, Germany: Ravensberg, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik
de.lifeSummary: Als Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg 1314 in Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto IV. von Ravensberg 38 und ihre Mutter Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck 30. Sie hat 1335 in Preußen, Deutschland Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Februar 1389 im Alter von 75 Jahren und wurde in Jülich begraben.

Lei sposato Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg nel 1335, nel Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 febbraio 1389, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Jülich.

ko.lifeSummary: Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg(이)가 1314년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto IV. von Ravensberg(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1335년 독일 프레우ss에서 Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 2월 13일 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 ju리치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg nasceu em 1314, em Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto IV. von Ravensberg, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg em 1335, em Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1389, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Jülich.

ru.Ravensberg, Westfalen, Germany: равенсбирг, крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg родилась в 1314 г. в местности провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto IV. von Ravensberg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha von Berg zu Windeck, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg в 1335 г. в местности Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 февраля 1389 г. в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности джuлич.
